title: Deep In Reflection
synopsis: An Escher-like metaphor for introspection: a woman and her reflection in a forest pool, plus moths. (Source: douban)

title: Kkomimanyeo Rara Season 1
synopsis: The Porr School of Magic is home to aspiring witches. Our protagonist Lara quickly begins to make friends, despite the school's best student, Gina, resenting Lara for being from a non magical family. Lara's energetic, witty, and charming personality helps her empathize with and heal the minipets, resolve magical disturbances, and gradually grow into a mini-witch!

title: Versailles no Bara: Moetsukita Bara no Shouzou
titleRomaji: Versailles no Bara: Moetsukita Bara no Shouzou
titleNative: ベルサイユのばら 燃えつきたバラの肖像
synonyms: The Rose of Versailles: Portrait of a Burning Rose
synopsis: Due to a conflict in scheduling, the broadcast of Versailles no Bara was cancelled in several regions after episode 23. In order to conclude the story, an original episode titled Moetsukita Bara no Shouzou was created. While it features some similar story beats to the actual story, it differs greatly. This episode was never aired again or released on home video.

title: Monk SEISHIN
synopsis: In the 19th century, a rice merchant encounters a mother who tries to buy rice in exchange for her own child's clothes. The merchant becomes Monk Seishin and relieves the islanders of Miyajima from poverty by digging wells and starting the wooden ladle industry.

title: The Princess of the Desert Kingdom
titleEnglish: The Princess of the Desert Kingdom
titleNative: さばくの国の王女さま
synopsis: When the spring that supplies water to her kingdom dries up, the Princess decides to go into the desert in search of a faraway oasis that is said to exist. The Princess and her animal friends face many challenges in their journey to save the draught-stricken kingdom.

title: HAIGAKURA
synopsis: Nozomu wants to be a writer, but for now she's just trying to find the right story. Walking home from school one day she bumps into some guys, and even though it's an accident, they hassle her until she is saved by a mysterious man. His name is Ichiyou, and he is searching for Gods. Nozomu sends him along his way only to be approached by Tenkou, who is searching for his Master. Nozomu reunites Ichiyou and Tenkou; (and their abusive relationship), and gets a view of another world. The two men are on a journey to find the Gods. The world that was once supported by four evil Gods, has fallen to a crisis. Using song and dance, it is up to the kashikans to bring back the Gods which fled from their confinement…

title: Chaofan Jinhua
synonyms: อุบัติการณ์เหนือมนุษย์
synopsis: The story follows young Ming He, whose "junk superpower" mutates into a special entity called the "Dependent Spirit" after colliding with the "Goddess" meteorite, triggering a series of adventures and crises.

title: Yi Ren Zhi Xia: Xiutie Chongxian
titleRomaji: Yi Ren Zhi Xia: Xiutie Chongxian
titleNative: 一人之下 锈铁重现
synonyms: 一人之下剧场版：锈铁篇
Yi Ren Zhi Xia Juchang Ban: Xuetie Pian
synopsis: The Nadutong Company where Zhang Chulan and Feng Baobao worked sent a special mission - to escort the former treasured sword "Hiruchiwan" to the border, fulfilling a decades-old agreement with the Ishikawa family of Yingguo. Zhang Chulan and Feng Baobao will face unfamiliar teammates, the harsh Northland weather in winter, and the powerful enemy who is eyeing the knife. A battle to defend "Zhichwan" started in the forest and snow fields. (Source: v.qq.com)

title: Lang Lang Shao Nu Lan
synopsis: We follow the daily lives of several high school students who are half-human, half-animal.

title: Tao Yu Mo Shi Zhi Shu
titleRomaji: Tao Yu Mo Shi Zhi Shu
synonyms: Peach and the Book of the Last Days
synopsis: Sparked by scientific experiments gone awry, civilization had collapsed in the future world and most regions had regressed to the tribal level. The incident also caused irreversible mutations in people, splitting them into two species: those with mechanical integrations called Machines, and those who had animal genes, Beast Spirits. As a Machine, Black-Eyed Rock roamed the path between the two races, in search of the answers to this world and fighting for everyone’s beliefs! (Source: Webcomics)

tags.name: Guns
tags.description: Prominently features the use of guns in combat.

title: Nian Fanchen
synopsis: Li Nianfan transmigrated into the world of immortal cultivation with a mortal body. After learning that he had no talent for cultivation, he settled down to live an ordinary life. But only to find... The dog he adopted watched his writing and painting, and became the demon lord that ruled half the world. The tree he planted in the backyard listened to him play and sing, and grew into the world tree that held up the bridge between heaven and earth. A casual conversation enlightened a passing traveler to become the immortal sage that defined the era... (Source: Tencent, translated)

title: Wu Ni
synonyms: ศึกปรปักษ์
synopsis: On the Tianwu Continent, the strong commands the weak. The young master of the Feng family Feng Hao, owns a unique physique but was mistakenly thought to be a failure in cultivation. He was chastised and humiliated constantly because of that. A chance meeting transformed him completely and ultimately altered his fate. He contoured his body with rare gems and eventually achieved invincibility. He was set on the path to conquering the void and rampaging through the universe! (Source: BiliBili Comics)

title: Kaiju Jiu You Wang Zhe Zhanghao
titleRomaji: Kaiju Jiu You Wang Zhe Zhanghao
synonyms: A Beginner with the Mightiest Account
It Starts with a Kingpin Account
There is a King Account at the Start
Start to Have the King Account
synopsis: The sudden crisis brought the earth directly into the OL era, and all mankind was under the influence of mysterious forces. Everyone became a level-one newbie. In this cruel dog-eat-dog world, the high school student Ye Hao could only rise to level three. When he was about to die, he accidentally triggered the king's account upgrade system, can Ye Hao become the strongest king? (Source: AC.QQ, translated)

title: Sengoku Youko
synonyms: 戰國妖狐 救世姊弟篇
戦国妖狐 世直し姉弟編
synopsis: The world is divided into two factions: humans and monsters called katawara. Despite being a katawara, Tama loves humans and vows to protect them from evil, even if it means fighting her own kind. Her brother Jinka, however, hates humans, despite mostly being one. The siblings are joined by a cowardly swordsman named Shinsuke, who wants to learn how to become strong. When the group uncovers a plot to experiment on humans and transform them into monsters, they vow to defeat whoever is behind it... Even if it means battling an entire army of warriors. (Source: Crunchyroll)
